successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official Columbia Magazine alumni features, prioritizing person-specific alumni stories with explicit school-year evidence and substantive professional or civic impact descriptions.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official Columbia Magazine alumni feature pages on magazine.columbia.edu.

items.name: Maria Weston Kuhn
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Maria Weston Kuhn ’23CC founded Drive US Forward to push for more accurate female crash-test dummies and safer cars for women.
items.description: Road-safety advocate and founder of Drive US Forward.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Ryan Greene
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Ryan Greene ’21BUS co-founded Quincy to help older adults navigate an increasingly digital world.
items.description: Tech-support startup co-founder focused on older adults.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Jackie Dubrovich
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Jackie Dubrovich ’16CC finished the Olympics on top, earning gold after years as an elite foil fencer.
items.description: Olympic gold medal-winning fencer.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Suzanne Reisman
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Suzanne Reisman ’00SIPA created a 'Garbage and Rats' walking tour that showcases New York City’s squeaky side.
items.description: New York City tour guide and author.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Federico Marchetti
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Yoox founder Federico Marchetti ’99BUS is pushing luxury fashion toward a more sustainable future.
items.description: Fashion-tech founder and sustainability advocate.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Father Joseph Fedora
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Father Joseph Fedora ’96JRN serves Lima’s most vulnerable residents while fighting Peru’s AIDS epidemic through the Maryknoll mission.
items.description: Maryknoll priest and public-health advocate.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Rosanne Haggerty
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Rosanne Haggerty ’89GSAPP leads Community Solutions and argues for new approaches to ending homelessness.
items.description: Housing and homelessness policy leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Mauricio Matiz
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Mauricio Matiz ’79SEAS, ’84SEAS became one of the few athletes inducted into the Ultimate Frisbee Hall of Fame.
items.description: Ultimate Frisbee Hall of Fame inductee.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Dan Abrams
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says legal analyst Dan Abrams turned his Columbia Law degree into a broad media empire spanning television, radio, and entrepreneurship.
items.description: Legal analyst and media entrepreneur.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Columbia Magazine feature with substantive career profile; accessible listing and article metadata did not explicitly surface the degree year used here.

items.name: Frances Perkins
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Frances Perkins 1910GSAS was a principal architect of Social Security as the landmark program reached its 90th year.
items.description: Architect of Social Security and historic labor leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Estelle Sohne
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Estelle Sohne ’04LAW founded Flour & Olive and uses cake to connect culture and community.
items.description: Founder of Flour & Olive.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Jove Meyer
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Jove Meyer ’11GS became one of New York’s most sought-after wedding planners.
items.description: Wedding planner and event entrepreneur.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Shaun Abreu
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Shaun Abreu ’14CC, chair of the New York City Council’s sanitation committee, is working to tackle the city’s rat problem.
items.description: New York City councilmember and sanitation-policy leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Tom Fishman
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Builders CEO Tom Fishman ’07GSAS is seeking practical ways to reduce political polarization by mobilizing people who prefer common ground over contempt.
items.description: Political-bridgebuilding entrepreneur.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Angela Co
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Angela Co ’05GSAPP uses Bird Collective and NYC Bird Alliance to protect regional birdlife while blending entrepreneurship with conservation.
items.description: Bird-conservation entrepreneur.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Gerard Papa
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Gerard Papa ’72CC, ’74SIPA, ’75LAW has used Brooklyn’s Flames program to bring New York kids together through basketball since 1974.
items.description: Youth basketball program founder and community leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Kenneth Cobb
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Kenneth Cobb ’78GSAS serves as a keeper of New York City’s public records and civic history.
items.description: Historian and steward of New York City public records.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Hal Hinkle
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Hal Hinkle ’76BUS, ’12GSAS, CEO of BamCore, applies business and science to climate challenges involving construction materials and carbon impacts.
items.description: Climate-focused business executive and builder of low-carbon materials.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: Charles Conconi
items.bio: Columbia Magazine says Charles Conconi ’92CC is building more economically sustainable tourism by highlighting hidden gems of rural Sri Lanka.
items.description: Travel entrepreneur focused on sustainable tourism.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.

items.name: William Milligan Sloane
items.bio: Columbia Magazine credits historian William Milligan Sloane 1868CC with helping shape the birth of the modern Olympic Games.
items.description: Historian connected to the founding of the modern Olympics.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official school or alumni-domain story/profile with explicit alumni identification and substantive career or impact details.
